# Security & Legal

Sentry provides self-serve access to various documentation and tools to help you with your security and compliance processes.

* #### [Legal and Compliance Documents](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/security/terms.md)

  Learn about Sentry's Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Data Processing Addendum, and Business Associate Amendment.

* #### [SOC2 Report & ISO 27001 Certificate](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/security/soc2.md)

  Learn about where you can access Sentry's latest SOC2 report and ISO 27001 certificate.

* #### [IP Ranges](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/security/ip-ranges.md)

  Learn how Sentry's SaaS product uses IP Ranges for API usage, event ingestion, outbound requests, and more.

* #### [SSL Protocols and Ciphers](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/security/ssl.md)

  Learn how Sentry's SaaS product uses SSL Protocols and Ciphers for security and compatibility.

* #### [Service Data Usage](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/security/service-data-usage.md)

  Learn about Sentry's approach to your data

* #### [Data Retention Periods](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/security/data-retention-periods.md)

  Learn about Sentry's data retention periods for different data types and plan tiers.

* #### [Data Privacy for Mobile](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/security/mobile-privacy.md)

  Learn about Sentry's frequently asked questions regarding data privacy for mobile apps.

* #### [Tax Documents](https://docs.sentry.io/security-legal-pii/security/tax-documents.md)

  Access Sentry's tax documents.

In addition:

* Our [Security Program Overview](https://sentry.io/security/) provides insight into how we view security and compliance at Sentry because they are fundamental to your experience with the product.
* We also maintain a [Privacy Shield Certification](https://www.privacyshield.gov/participant?id=a2zt0000000YdenAAC\&status=Active).

If you have any additional inquiries, please see our [options for contacting support](https://sentry.io/contact/support/).
